# Yohaku Companion v1.7.5

## Highlights

- Added dedicated concurrent media-session detection for QQ Music and NetEase Cloud Music, so active playback remains visible when the system-wide Now Playing session points to a paused or empty player.

## Fixes and reliability

- Added deterministic prioritization across supported players, including recent playback transitions and stable selection across track metadata changes.
- Preserved system-wide media detection as the fallback for browsers and other players without a dedicated adapter.
- Fixed Settings opened from the menu bar so the window reliably moves in front of the currently active application.
